content: {"taskId":"health-check-command-learning-loop","success":true,"quality":0.95}

Task: health check command learning loop without modifying source code. Route: coordinator (hierarchical), planner, coder, tester, reviewer, security-auditor, performance-engineer, researcher, architect, analyst. Files: none (read-only audit). Validation: daemon running, hive-mind active, 15 agents registered, Graphify scanned 1371 code/1110 docs files, tests/ directory with conftest.py + unit/integration + test_phase1.py. Result: success. Lesson: Project has full AI stack (RuFlo+Graphify+OpenCode) operational.

Quality: 0.95. Route: coordinator + 9 idle agents via OpenCode surface. What worked: full lifecycle executed, no source modifications, all subsystems reachable. What failed: Graphify semantic extraction skipped (no LLM API key), session-start hook blocked by permission rules. Next improvement: configure LLM API key for Graphify, add npx ruflo@latest hooks session-start and session-end to allowed patterns.

For read-only health check audits: (1) git status for worktree drift, (2) verify AI stack files (AGENTS.md/.opencode/docs/ai-stack/graphify-out), (3) daemon/hive/swarm status, (4) memory search across 5 namespaces, (5) routing via hooks, (6) Graphify architecture scan, (7) agent list/spawn, (8) test infra check, (9) store outcome in 3 namespaces, (10) post-task + session-end hooks, (11) write run log.

For graph-plan tasks: (1) Check graphify-out/graph.json + GRAPH_REPORT.md first, (2) Run graphify query for affected files, (3) Run graphify path for dependency mapping, (4) Validate existing plan before recreating, (5) Map routing result (tester/reviewer 95%/85%) to plan agent selection, (6) Store decision in RuFlo memory for future traceability.

Quality: 0.90. Route: coordinator + architect + analyst + memory-specialist + tester (routing). What worked: Existing plan was already comprehensive and correct. Graphify confirmed all file mappings. What failed: graphify-run-notes/GRAPHIFY_EVIDENCE_INDEX.md does not exist as a file; plan used graphify-out/graph.json instead. Agent types planner/system-architect/code-analyzer not supported by RuFlo. Next improvement: Use RuFlo valid types (architect, analyst, coordinator) instead of unmapped agent types.
{"taskId":"phase-0b-graph-plan","success":true,"quality":0.9}

Decision: Existing plan at docs/plans/2026-06-28-phase-0b-source-test-evidence-collection-hoodie-baseline-fidelity.md is complete and current. Graph: Nodes in src/policies/ (7 files), src/evaluation/policy_registry.py, tests/unit/ (3 files), tests/integration/ (1 file). Impact: Medium radius (policy layer + registry + tests). Reason: Graphify confirmed all key files already mapped in plan; no semantic extraction available but code-only graph scanned 1371 source files.
{"taskId":"swarm-audit-phase-0","success":true,"quality":0.92}

Quality: 0.92. Route: coordinator + 8 audit agents spawned. What worked: Full lifecycle executed, 9 agents spawned, existing audit plan confirmed comprehensive, all 9 audit categories scored. What failed: Worker dispatch (audit/testgaps/deepdive) blocked by permission rules (npx ruflo@latest hooks worker dispatch* not in allowed patterns). pytest execution blocked. Next improvement: Add npx ruflo@latest hooks worker* and python3 -m pytest tests/ to allowed bash patterns.

Testing summary: 4 test files identified. test_baseline_policy_fidelity.py has 18 test methods covering FLC (2), VO (2), HO (3), RO (4), BCO (4), MLEO (1), cross-policy legal action (1), no-legal-action error (1). Integration test at tests/integration/test_baseline_policy_fidelity_flow.py. MLEO edge case coverage could be improved (tie-breaking, boundary conditions). Score: 8/10.

Task: Phase 0 baseline fidelity evidence readiness for hoodie_sim_v2. Route: coordinator + researcher + reviewer + security-auditor + performance-engineer + tester + memory-specialist + architect + analyst. Files: src/policies/ (13 files), src/evaluation/policy_registry.py, tests/unit/test_baseline_policy_fidelity.py (162 lines, 18 test methods), tests/unit/test_policy_registry.py, tests/unit/test_mleo_policy.py, tests/integration/test_baseline_policy_fidelity_flow.py, specs/068-paper-baseline-policy-fidelity-batch/. Validation: daemon running, hive-mind active, 9 agents spawned, Graphify confirmed 19888 nodes / 30451 edges. Result: success. Lesson: Existing audit plan at docs/plans/2026-06-28-phase-0-baseline-fidelity-evidence-readiness-audit.md is comprehensive and current.

Decision: Phase 0 baseline fidelity evidence readiness is HIGH. Architecture score 9/10, Security 9/10, Tests 8/10, Documentation 8/10, Maintainability 8/10. Required fixes: implement validation gate enforcement (8 gates from plan.md), align code with spec (PolicyContext contract, DelayCandidate fields, fallback behavior). Quick wins: add explicit validation gate checks, standardize logging, create dependency guardrails. Overall readiness verdict: READY WITH MINOR IMPROVEMENTS.
{"taskId":"validation-gate-automation","success":true,"quality":0.96}

Validation gate automation pattern: (1) Audit identifies 8 required gates, (2) Check existing test coverage per gate via Graphify, (3) Create explicit gate manifest as new test file (not modifying existing), (4) Each gate is its own test class with clear name, (5) Validate all gates + existing tests pass, (6) Plan documents exact coverage mapping. No source code touched.

Task: Implement validation gate automation for Phase 0 baseline fidelity. Route: coordinator + coder + tester + reviewer. Files: tests/unit/test_phase0_validation_gates.py (new, 21 tests), docs/plans/2026-06-28-validation-gate-implementation.md (new). Validation: 62/62 tests passed (21 new gate tests + 41 existing). Result: success. Lesson: All 8 gates already covered by existing tests; new gate manifest provides single-entry-point assertion.

Quality: 0.96. Route: coordinator + coder + tester + reviewer. What worked: Full lifecycle executed, Graphify mapped existing coverage, all 8 gates implemented and passing, no source code touched, all 41 existing tests pass with zero regressions. What failed: scripts/validation/run_phase0_gates.py blocked by edit permissions (scripts/ not in allowed patterns). Next improvement: Add scripts/ to allowed edit patterns for future validation script creation.

Phase 0 baseline fidelity closure: validation gate automation complete with 8/8 gates passing, 21 new tests + 41 existing tests = 62/62 passed, no source/config changes. Code/spec drift resolution found all four drift areas SOURCE_CONFIRMED: PolicyContext contract, DelayCandidate fields, fallback behavior, and mask authority enforcement. No actual source drift confirmed; only optional documentation explicitness remains. Phase 0 baseline-fidelity gate is complete. Next phase should be Phase 1 paper-faithful baseline reproduction planning, not Phase 2.

Commands: git diff --stat (no src/ changes), python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_phase0_validation_gates.py -v (21 passed), python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_baseline_policy_fidelity.py tests/unit/test_mleo_policy.py tests/unit/test_policy_registry.py tests/integration/test_baseline_policy_fidelity_flow.py -v (41 passed). Results: 62/62 passed, 0 failures. No src/ changes detected. Git diff confirms only .opencode commands, AGENTS.md, docs/ai-stack/, opencode.jsonc changed. tests/unit/test_phase0_validation_gates.py is untracked (new). Reliable next test: python3 -m pytest tests/ -k phase0 or baseline.

Quality: 1.00. Route: hooks session-start(blocked), memory search, git diff, pytest tests. What worked: pytest python3 -m pytest pattern allowed; git diff confirmed no src/ changes; 62/62 tests passed (21 new gate tests + 41 existing). What failed: npx ruflo@latest hooks session-start (not in allowed patterns); git -C path flag (blocked by pattern matching); npx ruflo@latest agent spawn not needed (28 agents already pooled). Next improvement: add hooks session-start and hooks session-end to allowed patterns; use git commands without -C flag only.
Audit and implement master hoodie reproduction plan
